reasoning: CLEAN_BULL ribbon (65c spread, fast 734.68 > pivot 734.63 > slow 734.03) is the primary bullish signal, confirmed by overnight gap up +0.69 and risk-on sector rotation (XLK +1.28%, SPY +0.78%). The ribbon architecture supports a bullish bias, but the weak cash momentum warns against conviction until RTH opens and price reclaims the pivot.
